ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear, text-based PDF. All fields legible.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Clear, text-based PDF. All fields legible. 2 pages.

lc_check.lc_validation_reasoning: No LC/Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The remarks field contains reference numbers 2192507804 and 3192510034 which are delivery/order references, not LC references.

locations_found: Invoice page 1 footer: POSTADRESS/POSTAL ADRESS: Elmo Sweden AB, SE-512 81 SVENLJUNGA, SWEDEN
Invoice page 2 footer: POSTADRESS/POSTAL ADRESS: Elmo Sweden AB, SE-512 81 SVENLJUNGA, SWEDEN

criteria_met: Consignor 'Elmo Sweden AB' identified in invoice footer as postal address and issuer
Consignee 'Kallfeldts Läder AB' identified in invoice as Betalare/Godsmottagare
Certificate remarks reference 2192507804 matches invoice Leveransnummer 2192507804
pairing_validation.reasoning: All three pairing criteria are met: consignor name found in invoice, consignee found in invoice, and delivery reference matches. Valid document pair.

candidates.raw_text:
1 Hrs
HS Code 4107 1291
Elmosoft 99999 III
Gross Weight
Net Weight

checkpoints.certificate_value: Elmo Sweden AB, Kyrkogatan 18, 51250, Svenljunga, Sweden
checkpoints.invoice_value: Elmo Sweden AB, SE-512 81 SVENLJUNGA, SWEDEN (footer postal address)

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'Elmo Sweden AB' anywhere in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Elmo Sweden AB found in invoice footer (POSTADRESS/POSTAL ADRESS: Elmo Sweden AB, SE-512 81 SVENLJUNGA, SWEDEN) on pages 1 and 2. Also found as brand/logo 'elmo®' in invoice header. The invoice is issued by Elmo Sweden AB.

comparison_steps.description: Compare company name from certificate with invoice issuer
comparison_steps.details: Certificate: 'Elmo Sweden AB'. Invoice footer: 'Elmo Sweden AB'. Exact match after normalization.
Invoice footer explicitly states 'SWEDEN' in postal address. Additionally, VAT number SE556821587401 has SE prefix confirming Sweden.

rules_applied.description: Group structure – consignor name found explicitly in invoice footer as issuer
Country verification via indirect identifiers – SE prefix in VAT number and explicit SWEDEN in postal address

checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets consignor 'Elmo Sweden AB' kan identifieras exakt i fakturans footer (POSTADRESS/POSTAL ADRESS: Elmo Sweden AB, SE-512 81 SVENLJUNGA, SWEDEN). Fakturan är utställd av Elmo Sweden AB. Landet Sweden bekräftas via explicit 'SWEDEN' i adressen samt SE-prefix i VAT-numret SE556821587401. Gatuadressen skiljer sig (Kyrkogatan 18 i certifikatet vs SE-512 81 Svenljunga i fakturan) men detta påverkar inte bedömningen enligt regel 4.1.5 – företagsnamn och land är verifierade.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'Elmo Sweden AB, Kyrkogatan 18, 51250, Svenljunga, Sweden'. Invoice issuer from footer: 'Elmo Sweden AB, SE-512 81 SVENLJUNGA, SWEDEN'. Name: exact match. Country: Sweden confirmed via explicit text and VAT prefix SE. Rule 4.1.0 applied – consignor found in invoice. Address difference (Kyrkogatan 18 vs SE-512 81) is irrelevant per 4.1.5.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Kallfeldts Läder AB, Esbjörnarp 10, 561 92 Huskvarna, Sweden
checkpoints.invoice_value: Kallfeldts Läder AB (11004745), Esbjörnarp 10, SE 561 92 - Huskvarna, Sverige

comparison_steps.description: Identify primary billing field in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice has 'Betalare' (=Buyer/Bill-to) field with 'Kallfeldts Läder AB (11004745), Esbjörnarp 10, SE 561 92 - Huskvarna, Sverige'. This is the primary billing field.

comparison_steps.description: Compare consignee name from certificate with invoice Betalare
comparison_steps.details: Certificate: 'Kallfeldts Läder AB'. Invoice Betalare: 'Kallfeldts Läder AB'. Exact match.
Certificate: 'Sweden'. Invoice: 'Sverige' (Swedish for Sweden). Same country after normalization. Also confirmed by SE prefix in VAT number SE556358984401.

rules_applied.description: Priority order – Betalare (Bill-to) is primary billing field
Name verification – exact name match after normalization
Country verification – Sweden/Sverige normalized to same country

checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets consignee 'Kallfeldts Läder AB' identifieras exakt i fakturans Betalare-fält (primärt faktureringsfält). Adressen överensstämmer: Esbjörnarp 10, 561 92 Huskvarna. Landet Sweden (certifikat) = Sverige (faktura) efter normalisering. Ytterligare bekräftelse via SE-prefix i momsregistreringsnumret SE556358984401.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'Kallfeldts Läder AB, Esbjörnarp 10, 561 92 Huskvarna, Sweden'. Invoice Betalare: 'Kallfeldts Läder AB (11004745), Esbjörnarp 10, SE 561 92 - Huskvarna, Sverige'. Name: exact match. Address: exact match (minor formatting difference with SE prefix and hyphens). Country: Sweden=Sverige – standard localization, MATCH. Also verified via Godsmottagare field which shows same party.

checkpoints.invoice_value: ELMOSOFT 99999 III (Benämning), varukod 41071291, Upholstery Leather, 1 Hrs, Tarif no 4107 1291 (HS)

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains article numbers
comparison_steps.details: Certificate does not contain explicit article numbers (product codes). The HS code 4107 1291 is a tariff classification, not an article number. The product identifier is 'Elmosoft 99999 III' which is a product name/description, not an article code in the traditional sense. Proceeding to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation and match against invoice
comparison_steps.details: Identity-bearing main designation in certificate: 'Elmosoft 99999 III'. Invoice article rows all show 'ELMOSOFT 99999 III' in Benämning column. Exact match after case normalization. HS code also matches: certificate '4107 1291', invoice varukod '41071291' and footer 'Tarif no 4107 1291 (HS)'.

Certificate mentions '1 Hrs' – invoice also states '1 Hrs' in goods footer. Invoice additionally mentions 'Upholstery Leather' and 'Swedish Origin' which are additional descriptors not in certificate – per rule 2.1, additional information in invoice does not cause MISMATCH.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching – identity-bearing main designation 'Elmosoft 99999 III' found exactly in invoice
Non-identity-bearing additions – additional text in invoice (Upholstery Leather, Swedish Origin) does not affect identity

checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'Elmosoft 99999 III' kan identifieras exakt i fakturans artikelrader (ELMOSOFT 99999 III). HS-koden 4107 1291 överensstämmer. Fakturans ytterligare beskrivningar ('Upholstery Leather', 'Swedish Origin') utgör icke-identitetsbärande tillägg som inte påverkar bedömningen.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate goods: 'Elmosoft 99999 III' with HS Code 4107 1291. Invoice goods: 'ELMOSOFT 99999 III' on all 9 article rows with varukod 41071291. Main designation exact match. HS code match (4107 1291 = 41071291 with space normalization). Additional info in invoice footer ('Upholstery Leather', 'Swedish Origin', '1 Hrs') is supplementary and consistent. Rule 4.3.3 applied for text matching. No article numbers to verify via Priority 1.

checkpoints.certificate_value: 709,56 M2 / Gross Weight 571 Kgs / Net Weight 501 Kgs
checkpoints.invoice_value: Total M2: 709,56 M2 / Gross Weight 571 kgs / Net weight 501 kgs

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains three quantities: 709,56 M2, 571 Kgs (GW), 501 Kgs (NW)
comparison_steps.details: All three quantities are in box 7. Primary quantity appears to be 709,56 M2 (area measurement) with weight values also specified.

comparison_steps.description: Check if 709.56 M2 can be identified in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice page 2 states 'Total M2: 709,56 M2'. Exact match after decimal notation normalization (comma as decimal separator in both documents).

comparison_steps.description: Check if GW 571 Kgs can be identified in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice goods footer states 'Gross Weight 571 kgs'. Exact match. Same numeric value, same unit, same weight category.

comparison_steps.description: Check if NW 501 Kgs can be identified in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice goods footer states 'Net weight 501 kgs'. Exact match. Same numeric value, same unit, same weight category.

comparison_steps.description: Check for contradictions across all three quantities
comparison_steps.details: All three quantities (709.56 M2, GW 571 Kgs, NW 501 Kgs) verified as exact matches. No contradictions found.

rules_applied.description: Occurrence check – all three quantities found exactly in invoice
Multiple quantities – all verified, no contradictions
Weight category – GW and NW both explicitly stated in certificate and invoice, matching

checkpoints.motivation: Samtliga tre kvantitetsuppgifter i certifikatet kan identifieras exakt i fakturan: 709,56 M2 matchar fakturans 'Total M2: 709,56 M2', Gross Weight 571 Kgs matchar fakturans 'Gross Weight 571 kgs', och Net Weight 501 Kgs matchar fakturans 'Net weight 501 kgs'. Viktkategorier (GW/NW) och enheter (Kgs) överensstämmer. Inga motsägelser.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7: 709,56 M2 / 571 Kgs (GW) / 501 Kgs (NW). Invoice: Total M2: 709,56 M2 (page 2), Gross Weight 571 kgs (page 1 footer), Net weight 501 kgs (page 1 footer). All three exact matches. No need for exceptions 3A-3E. Verification by direct occurrence check (4.4.1). M2 sum also verifiable via 3D (sum of 9 rows: 84.98+43.07+154.38+51.71+155.73+17.95+36.89+48.15+116.70 = 709.56) but direct occurrence check sufficient.

comparison_steps.description: Search for origin information in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice goods footer section contains 'Swedish Origin' – this is an explicit origin statement equivalent to 'Origin: Sweden'.

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate's EU + Sweden can be verified against invoice's 'Swedish Origin'
comparison_steps.details: Certificate states 'EUROPEAN UNION, Sweden'. Invoice states 'Swedish Origin'. Sweden is an EU member state. Per rule 4.5.4.2.1: certificate states 'EU [land]' (EU + one specific EU member state Sweden), invoice confirms Swedish origin. 'Swedish Origin' is equivalent to 'Origin: Sweden'. Sweden is EU member → EU origin is inherently confirmed. Applying rule 4.5.4.2.1: 'EU [land]' with one member state, invoice confirms that member state's origin → MATCH.

comparison_steps.step: 4.5.4.1 – Check for non-EU origins in invoice
comparison_steps.description: Verify no contradictory non-EU origins in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice contains only 'Swedish Origin'. No non-EU origins found. No contradiction.

rules_applied.description: EU member state normalization – Sweden is EU member, certificate says EU+Sweden, invoice confirms Swedish Origin
EU [land] undantag – certificate states EU combined with one specific EU member state (Sweden), invoice confirms that member state's origin via 'Swedish Origin'
Normalization – 'Swedish Origin' normalized to Sweden as country of origin

checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatet anger ursprungsland 'EUROPEAN UNION, Sweden'. Fakturan anger 'Swedish Origin' i varuinformationsblocket. 'Swedish Origin' utgör en explicit ursprungsangivelse och motsvarar Sverige. Sverige är EU-medlemsstat. Enligt regel 4.5.4.2.1 accepteras detta när certifikatet anger EU kombinerat med ett specifikt EU-medlemsland och fakturan bekräftar det landets ursprung. Inga icke-EU-ursprungsländer förekommer i fakturan.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3: 'EUROPEAN UNION, Sweden'. Invoice: 'Swedish Origin' in goods footer. 'Swedish Origin' is an explicit origin statement per 4.5.1. Sweden is an EU-27 member state. Certificate format is 'EU [land]' with one member state (Sweden). Rule 4.5.4.2.1 applies: EU combined with one specific EU member state, invoice confirms that state's origin → MATCH. No non-EU origins in invoice → no contradiction per 4.5.4.1.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: No LC reference found in certificate
Document A identified as certificate (1 page), Document B identified as invoice (2 pages). Single certificate, single invoice. Standard pairing.
PASSED – All three criteria met: consignor found in invoice, consignee found in invoice, delivery reference 2192507804 matches.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Group structure – consignor search in all invoice files
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH – 'Elmo Sweden AB' found in invoice footer on both pages as postal address and issuer.
MATCH – Sweden verified via explicit text 'SWEDEN' in footer and SE prefix in VAT number.
Betalare (Bill-to) identified as primary billing field containing Kallfeldts Läder AB.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Controlled text matching – identity-bearing main designation
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH – 'Elmosoft 99999 III' found exactly in invoice article rows.
MATCH – All three quantities (709.56 M2, GW 571 Kgs, NW 501 Kgs) found exactly in invoice.
Not applicable – single invoice, quantities verified by direct occurrence.
Not applicable – same units in both documents (Kgs).

rule_evaluation_log.description: EU [land] exception – EU combined with one specific member state
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH – Certificate says 'EU, Sweden', invoice says 'Swedish Origin'. Sweden is EU member. Single member state combined with EU → invoice confirms that member state.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Address mismatch for consignor could indicate different entity
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Certificate address is Kyrkogatan 18, 51250 Svenljunga. Invoice footer shows SE-512 81 SVENLJUNGA. The difference is the specific street address (Kyrkogatan 18 vs postal code area). Per rule 4.1.5, address differences do not cause MISMATCH when company name and country are verified. Both clearly refer to Elmo Sweden AB in Svenljunga, Sweden.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Invoice origin 'Swedish Origin' might not constitute an explicit origin field
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: 'Swedish Origin' appears in the goods information section alongside tariff number, EORI and REX number. This is equivalent to 'Origin: Sweden' and constitutes an explicit origin statement per rule 4.5.1 (matching 'Goods are of … origin' pattern).

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Certificate reference numbers 2192507804 and 3192510034 might be invoice numbers that should be verified
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: These are in the Remarks field (box 5), not in a field labeled 'Invoice number'. The number 2192507804 matches the invoice's 'Leveransnummer' (delivery number), and 3192510034 is close to but not identical to 3192510045 in the invoice's moms section. These are delivery/order references, not invoice numbers. The certificate does not explicitly reference invoice number 2025001664, but this is not required – the certificate references the delivery by its delivery number, which is verified.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens. Avsändaren Elmo Sweden AB identifieras som fakturans utställare, mottagaren Kallfeldts Läder AB matchar fakturans betalare, varubeskrivningen Elmosoft 99999 III finns exakt i fakturan, samtliga kvantiteter (709,56 M2, bruttovikt 571 kg, nettovikt 501 kg) överensstämmer, och ursprungslandet Sverige/EU bekräftas av fakturans angivelse 'Swedish Origin'. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
summary_of_matches: Consignor: Elmo Sweden AB – exact match in invoice issuer/footer
Consignee: Kallfeldts Läder AB – exact match in invoice Betalare field
Goods description: Elmosoft 99999 III – exact match in invoice article rows
Quantity: 709.56 M2, GW 571 Kgs, NW 501 Kgs – all three exact matches
Country of origin: EU/Sweden – verified via 'Swedish Origin' in invoice

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.certificate_value: Elmo Sweden AB, Kyrkogatan 18, 51250, Svenljunga, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Elmo Sweden AB, SE-512 81 SVENLJUNGA, SWEDEN (fakturans utställare/footer)
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur (4.1.0) – consignor identifieras som fakturans utställare i footer
sections.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'Elmo Sweden AB' identifieras exakt i fakturans footer. Landet Sweden bekräftas via adress och VAT-prefix SE. Adressskillnad (Kyrkogatan 18 vs SE-512 81) påverkar inte bedömningen.

sections.certificate_value: Kallfeldts Läder AB, Esbjörnarp 10, 561 92 Huskvarna, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Kallfeldts Läder AB (11004745), Esbjörnarp 10, SE 561 92 - Huskvarna, Sverige
sections.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'Kallfeldts Läder AB' matchar exakt i fakturans Betalare-fält. Adressen överensstämmer. Landet Sweden = Sverige efter normalisering.

sections.invoice_value: ELMOSOFT 99999 III, varukod 41071291, Upholstery Leather, 1 Hrs
sections.motivation: Huvudbeteckningen 'Elmosoft 99999 III' identifieras exakt i fakturans artikelrader. HS-koden 4107 1291 överensstämmer med fakturans varukod 41071291.

sections.certificate_value: 709,56 M2 / Gross Weight 571 Kgs / Net Weight 501 Kgs
sections.invoice_value: Total M2: 709,56 M2 / Gross Weight 571 kgs / Net weight 501 kgs
sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll – samtliga kvantiteter identifierade exakt i fakturan
sections.motivation: Samtliga tre kvantitetsuppgifter verifierade: 709,56 M2 (fakturans Total M2), GW 571 Kgs, NW 501 Kgs. Exakta matchningar utan avvikelser.

sections.rule_applied: EU-normalisering – certifikat anger EU + Sverige, faktura bekräftar svenskt ursprung
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger 'European Union, Sweden'. Fakturan anger 'Swedish Origin'. Sverige är EU-medlemsstat. Enligt regel 4.5.4.2.1 godkänns detta när certifikatet anger EU kombinerat med ett specifikt EU-medlemsland och fakturan bekräftar det landets ursprung.

output_quality_checks.notes: All five checkpoints evaluated and returned MATCH. No confidence values below 0.85 threshold. Comparison result IDENTICAL is consistent with all MATCH statuses. Workflow recommendation AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL result.
